title: Podcast EP356: An Oveview of the Unique Skills and Broad Impact of Alphacore with Andrew Levy - Semiwiki
author: Daniel Nenni
text:
Podcast EP356: An Oveview of the Unique Skills and Broad Impact of Alphacore with Andrew Levyby Daniel Nenni on 07-17-2026 at 2:00 pm

View Profile

View Forum Posts

View Articles

Private Message

Categories: Alphacore, IP

Daniel is joined by Andrew Levy, Vice President of Business Development, IP & ASIC at Alphacore. Andrew leads strategic growth initiatives, customer engagement, technology commercialization, and business development activities for the company’s semiconductor IP, ASIC design services, and advanced microelectronics solutions. Andrew brings more than two decades of experience spanning semiconductor business development, marketing, program management, and technology commercialization.
Dan explores Alphacore’s growth from a specialty IP company focusing on analog/mixed-signal and RF to a full-service ASIC solutions provider across multiple high-growth markets. Andrew explains that the specialty IP developed by Alphacore became the critical enabling technology for many of its customers’ designs. Because Alphacore possessed deep design knowledge about this IP and strong relationships with the manufacturing ecosystem, building the complete ASIC became a natural extension of the company’s work.
In this in-depth and informative discussion, Andrew describes the unique skills the Alphacore team possesses to work with customers and build targeted, customized versions of its IP that meet the unique needs of each project. He describes deep domain skills across low power, high-performance, imaging, and power management for example. The company is doing work across a broad range of markets including government, aerospace, telecom, and automotive.
